## Type of Change

Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update (no code changes)
- [ ] 🎨 Style/Refactor (improving code quality without altering behavior)
- [ ] ✅ Test (adding or updating tests)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the [Dart Style Guide](https://dart.dev/effective-dart/style)
- [ ] I have run `flutter analyze` and there are no warnings or errors
- [ ] I have updated the `CHANGELOG.md` under the `[Unreleased]` section
- [ ] I have updated corresponding documentation in `README.md` or wiki (if applicable)
- [ ] I have ensured **NO SECRETS** (API keys, tokens, etc.) are included in my commits
